name: FinTV
description: FinTV turns your Jellyfin library into always-on broadcast channels with 30-minute lineup grids, smart scheduling, commercial breaks, channel logos, WeatherStar weather channel, and M3U/XMLTV Live TV integration.
overview: Simulated live TV channels with lineups, commercials, and IPTV streaming

versions.changelog:
- Fix FinTV admin buttons (including Create Missing Channels) not responding after navigating away and back
- Fix AI Test Connection button staying disabled until AI is saved; allow testing unsaved API keys before enable
- Add The Holiday Channel seasonal scheduling with dynamic logos, themed catalog matching, and off-season playback
- Add Slappy comedy channel with Animation Domination 6pm block and comedy-only catalog filtering
- Add channel AI catalog rules for FlashBack, Retro, Flip TV, Past Tense News, Cops And Robbers, and more presets
- Add AI auto-apply on channel add and optional apply-to-all on save with 14-day playout rebuild
- Fix FinTV admin AI tab JSON errors and lineup apply failures
- Add FinTV-ready Jellyfin unstable Docker image with Docker CLI 29.5.2 and Playwright Chromium on GHCR
- Use baked-in Playwright browsers on Linux when PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH is set (custom Jellyfin image)
- Fix FinTV admin "Unexpected end of JSON input" when saving lineups, AI settings, or deleting channels (204 No Content responses)
- Fix Venice AI test and lineup generation when models reject OpenAI response_format JSON mode
- Bundle install-docker-cli-jellyfin.sh for Docker-in-Docker Jellyfin WeatherStar setup
- Add ws4kp and ws3kp Docker start/stop controls on Weather tab for self-hosted WeatherStar 4000+ and 3000+
- Extend playout horizon to 14 days with hourly auto-extend so schedules roll forward without wiping future items
- Add AI playout templates (Classic Cable dayparts, Kids All Day, Movie Marathon) for time-of-day scheduling
- Add AI Lineup Generator tab with OpenAI and Venice API support for auto-building channel schedules
- Send tagged Jellyfin series and movies to the AI and assign specific shows or movies to 48 lineup slots
- Support merged timeslots for long movies and per-channel TV-only, movie-only, or mixed catalog modes
- Add channel fine-tune prompts, AI enable switch, lineup preview, apply, and generate-all actions
- Fix channel library tag filters so preset tags apply during catalog and playout queries
- Update OpenSwim preset to 119.3 and Flip Television to 119.4 with preset refresh by library tag
- Split EBS off-air audio into independent TV static, white noise, silence, and beep tone options
- Fix XMLTV guide excluding regular playout items so Jellyfin Live TV shows programme data
- Add EBS admin tab with custom slate uploads, color bars, and TV static with white noise
- Play EBS background music on weather channels and use configured EBS playback on errors
- Add USA and International off-air slate selection with custom PNG/JPG overrides
- Fix logo sync concurrency when re-indexing EBS logo entries
- Fix Apply Logos to Channels failing with 500 when channels reference missing logo sets
- Fix custom logo uploads returning 401 by sending Jellyfin auth through multipart requests
- Handle Jellyfin server outages gracefully in the admin UI instead of uncaught fetch errors
- Bundle yt-dlp for Windows and Linux so CommercialBrainz YouTube commercials stream without a separate install
- Stream CommercialBrainz YouTube commercials live at break time instead of downloading them
- Stream synced YouTube commercials during breaks (yt-dlp recommended for reliable playback)
- Show weather channel lineup as 24/7 Local Weather in the admin Lineups tab
- Show weather channel lineup as 24/7 Local Weather in the admin Lineups tab
- Build weather playout automatically when applying weather channel presets
- Fix plugin publish failing when Playwright driver artifacts were missing from the zip
- Use Playwright official Docker image for weather channels on Linux
- Keep local Playwright Chromium on Windows for weather channels
- Bundle cross-platform Playwright drivers in the plugin zip
- Bundle cross-platform Playwright drivers in the plugin zip
- Show On Air status on Channels tab when a channel has active viewers
- Fix XMLTV guide encoding so Jellyfin Live TV channel mapping works
- Bundle WeatherStar4000 and WeatherStar3000 channel logos from open-channel-logos
- Add Weather tab with configurable WeatherStar4000 base URL
- Weather channels now stream live local weather 24/7 in a continuous loop
- Add No Bug option to channel Bug Placement setting
- Fix Content Type, Aspect Ratio, and Bug Placement not saving in FinTV admin
- Fix Binarygeek119 logo sync failing with database concurrency errors on re-sync
- Fix admin now-playing panel causing 404 console noise when no playout is airing
- Support five-decimal weather coordinates such as 41.60574,-93.55002
- Add Delete button to each channel row in the admin channel list
- Fix FinTV admin showing NaN.NaN and undefined when Jellyfin returns PascalCase JSON
- Harden channel API JSON output by omitting DefaultLineup navigation property
- Fix channels and logo sets API failing with JSON circular reference errors
- Fix FinTV tabs and buttons targeting Jellyfin hidden page copies (hide class)
- Fix FinTV admin not initializing on Jellyfin 12 (load admin.js via data-controller)
- Fix FinTV admin.js not loading on Jellyfin 12 (use static script tag and pageshow boot)
- Fix Rebuild All Playouts task failing with missing PlayoutBuilderService DI registration
- Fix FinTV admin buttons binding to a hidden page copy after Jellyfin navigation
- Fix New Channel panel not opening when logo set API call fails
- Fix Binarygeek119 logo set not persisted on first import (broke preset apply with FK error)
- Fix FinTV admin API helper for Jellyfin 12 promise-based ApiClient.ajax
- Fix FinTV admin POST requests sending invalid JSON through ApiClient.ajax
- Fix JavaScript syntax error that prevented FinTV admin.js from loading
- Fix FinTV admin buttons by dynamically loading admin.js on each page show
- Fix FinTV admin page not loading CSS/JS on Jellyfin 12 dashboard
- Fix migration crash from CancellationToken passed as SQL parameter
- Fix SQLite channel number migration when IX_Channels_Number blocks DROP COLUMN
- Bundle Binarygeek119 Set/English logos inside the plugin zip (no GitHub required on first run)
- Play EBS off-air slates with background music when a channel has no scheduled media
- Add Binarygeek119 ready-made channel presets with legacy or subchannel numbering
- Redesign admin UI with lineup editor, presets tab, modals, and toasts
- Support decimal channel numbers (e.g. 1.1–4.3) with SQLite schema migration
- Fix Live TV M3U/XMLTV URLs with anonymous IPTV endpoints and public base URL setting
- Fix GitHub Actions build workflow to target net10.0 for Jellyfin 12
- Add Jellyfin library catalog search for lineup item picker
